intentSynonyms: look up a schedule in temporal
fetch a single schedule in temporal
view one specific schedule in temporal
get schedule details and recent actions in temporal
description: Get detailed information about a specific schedule including its spec (interval/cron), action configuration, policies, pause state, and recent execution history.

namespace.description: Temporal namespace (e.g., "prod-us-west-2.abc123"). Defaults to the namespace in the current browser tab.
